pages.text: Grants the consumer:$(br)$(li)1 minute of Shadowmeld 4$(li)5 minutes of Strength 4$(li)5 minutes of Resistance 3$(li)10 minutes of Nourishment$(li)10 minutes of Comfort$(br)Upon consumption, time is set to night, the number of minions summoned in a single cast is doubled (lasting 5 minutes), all minions permanently gain a +5% bonus to Attack, Health, and Armor (stacks up to 12 times), and the minion cap is doubled (applies only once).
